  Log:
  - Add p5-Multiplex-CMD 0.03

  for many hosts.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Multiplex-CMD/
  
  PR:             ports/155754
  Submitted by:   Andrey Ignatov <rdna@rdna.ru>
